stages.concept:
# Unit 131: 관계대명사의 생략 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계대명사의 생략**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적격 관계대명사**는 생략할 수 있어요!

> The book **(which/that)** I read was interesting.
> → The book I read was interesting. ✅
> 내가 읽은 책은 재미있었다.

> The man **(whom/that)** I met was kind.
> → The man I met was kind. ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: **주격 관계대명사**는 생략할 수 **없어요**!

> The boy **who** is running is my friend. ✅
> ❌ The boy is running is my friend.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 단, 주격 관계대명사 + be동사는 **함께** 생략 가능!

> The boy **who is** running → The boy running ✅
> The letter **which was** written by her → The letter written by her ✅

**Q. 다음 중 밑줄 친 관계대명사를 생략할 수 '없는' 문장을 고르세요.**
1. The picture <u>which</u> was painted by him is famous. ✅
2. The man <u>whom</u> I saw yesterday was a doctor.
3. This is the bag <u>that</u> she bought.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! 2번과 3번은 목적격이라 생략 가능하지만, 1번은 주격 관계대명사 단독(which만)으로는 생략할 수 없어요. 만약 생략하려면 be동사(was)와 함께 묶어서(which was) 생략해야 한답니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정리:

| 관계대명사 | 생략 가능 여부 |
|------|------|
| 목적격 (whom/which/that) | ✅ 생략 가능 |
| 주격 (who/which/that) | ❌ 생략 불가 |
| 주격 + be동사 | ✅ 함께 생략 가능 |

🧑‍🎓 학생: 목적격은 생략 가능, 주격은 불가! 주격 + be동사는 함께 생략 가능! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 131: 관계대명사의 생략 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는지 없는지 선택하시오.
I love watching movies which my friend made.
> **정답** 생략 가능 (목적격 관계대명사)

---

**02.** The boy who lives next door is kind.
> **정답** 생략 불가 (주격 관계대명사)

---

**03.** The cake that she made was delicious.
> **정답** 생략 가능 (목적격 관계대명사)

---

**04.** I know a girl who can speak three languages.
> **정답** 생략 불가 (주격 관계대명사)

---

**05.** The book which I bought yesterday is interesting.
> **정답** 생략 가능 (목적격 관계대명사)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 관계대명사를 생략하여 문장을 다시 쓰시오.
The pen which I lost was new.
> **정답** The pen I lost was new.

---

**07.** The man whom she met was a doctor.
> **정답** The man she met was a doctor.

---

**08.** The movie that we watched was great.
> **정답** The movie we watched was great.

---

**09.** The gift which he gave me was beautiful.
> **정답** The gift he gave me was beautiful.

---

**10.** The song that I like most is this one.
> **정답** The song I like most is this one.

---

**11.** 관계대명사를 생략할 수 있으면 O, 없으면 X를 쓰시오.
The girl who dances well is my sister.
> **정답** X (주격)

---

**12.** The food that he cooked was tasty.
> **정답** O (목적격)

---

**13.** The dog which is barking is mine.
> **정답** X (주격)

---

**14.** The place that I visited was beautiful.
> **정답** O (목적격)

---

**15.** The teacher who teaches math is strict.
> **정답** X (주격)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
(관계대명사 생략)
내가 산 책은 재미있다.
The book bought I is interesting
> **정답** The / book / I / bought / is / interesting

---

**17.** 그녀가 만든 케이크는 맛있었다.
The cake made she was delicious
> **정답** The / cake / she / made / was / delicious

---

**18.** 우리가 본 영화는 슬펐다.
The movie watched we was sad
> **정답** The / movie / we / watched / was / sad

---

**19.** 그가 준 선물은 예뻤다.
The gift gave he me was pretty
> **정답** The / gift / he / gave / me / was / pretty

---

**20.** 내가 좋아하는 노래는 이것이다.
The song like I most is this one
> **정답** The / song / I / like / most / is / this / one
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 131: 관계대명사의 생략 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The boy who kicked a soccer ball is my
classmate.
Every money that you save today will save you
in the future.
The girl who is dancing on the stage is Amy.
This is the girl who wrote this essay.
> **정답** The girl who is dancing on the stage is Amy., Every money that you save today will save you in the future.

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Amy is the most popular girl whom many
boys like.
We climbed the mountain which is the highest
in Seoul.
Tom is a boy whose brother is my English
teacher.
We will buy the same shoes that you bought
yesterday.
> **정답** Amy is the most popular girl whom many boys like., We will buy the same shoes that you bought yesterday.

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I cannot forget the movie which contains a
sad story.
This is a book which Amy likes to read.
She wrote many stories which taught kids
good lessons.
The girl whom I met yesterday is Amy.
> **정답** I cannot forget the movie which contains a sad story., She wrote many stories which taught kids good lessons.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
The car which is parked here is not mine.
I was happy to see the child who was talking
to Mr. Brown.
I like the girl who is the prettiest in my class.
Tom is the player that I like best.
> **정답** I like the girl who is the prettiest in my class.

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Amy is wearing a ring _________ her father gave her.
I didn't know the girl _________ he likes.
that
whose
who
which
> **정답** that

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
She likes the boy ____________ living next door.
I have a friend ____________ interested in painting.
which is
who is
who are
which are
> **정답** who is

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오. (2개)
The woman you met on the street is my
mother.
This is the pen I bought yesterday.
The house is burnt down was in this
neighborhood.
Amy is the girl has blond hair.
> **정답** This is the pen I bought yesterday., The woman you met on the street is my mother.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오. (2개)
Look at the children singing on the stage.
The people whom break the rules will be
punished.
The dress she is wearing is very pretty.
The museum whose we visited last month
closed now.
> **정답** The dress she is wearing is very pretty., Look at the children singing on the stage.

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고른
것은?
(a) The smartphone that I bought doesn't work.
(b) Amy is my friend who lives next door.
(c) This is the letter which came from Japan.
(d) Look at the boy who is playing soccer.
(a), (c)
(a), (d)
(a), (b)
(c), (d)
> **정답** (a), (d)

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
Tom is a student that you can work with.
There was a new tower which looked great.
The camera which I bought works nicely.
The boy who is standing there is Tom.
> **정답** There was a new tower which looked great.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
I saw the girl whose eyes are blue at the
subway station.
I don't remember the address that you gave
me.
Look at the black cat which is jumping up and
down.
The man who we saw is not a famous actor.
> **정답** I saw the girl whose eyes are blue at the subway station.

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
The lady whom I met yesterday was Amy's
mother.
Tom is the student that all teachers like.
The people who work for the company are
very diligent.
The birds which were singing in the tree flew
away.
> **정답** The people who work for the company are very diligent.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The place in which I met my boyfriend is the
Central Park.
Is this the old man whose horse won the race?
A man and his dog that were passing by were
injured.
That is the girl who they are looking for.
> **정답** That is the girl who they are looking for.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The dog which is sleeping on the couch looks
sick.
This is the bag in which I put my stuff.
English is the subject which Tom likes most.
People who exercise regularly are healthy.
> **정답** English is the subject which Tom likes most.

---

**15.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 부분에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을
모두 고르시오. (2개)
The book I bought is very exciting.
which
who
what
that
> **정답** that, which

---

**16.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 부분에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을
모두 고르시오. (2개)
I know the man standing over there.
who is
that is
which is
who are
> **정답** who is, that is

---

**17.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(a) I watched a movie which was about A.I.
(b) I got an email from the girl whom I met in
England.
(c) There are many people who are studying in the
cafe.
(d) What was the song to which you were
listening?
(a), (b)
(a), (d)
(b), (c)
(b), (d)
> **정답** (b), (c)

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 부분에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을
순서대로 고르시오.
Tom likes the watch made in Switzerland.
I'd like to have some cookies you made.
which is - that
who is - whose
who is- what
which is - what
> **정답** which is - that

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 부분에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을
순서대로 고르시오.
She is the girl Tom wants to see.
This is my favorite book written in English.
whom - which
who - which are
what- which
whom - which is
> **정답** whom - which is

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 that을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Tom is my friend that works in Chicago.
The cheese cake that I had last night was very
delicious.
Paris is one of the beautiful cities that I've
visited.
I like storybooks that have fun characters.
> **정답** The cheese cake that I had last night was very delicious., Paris is one of the beautiful cities that I've visited.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 131 관계대명사의 생략중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오. 단, 생략 가능한
말이 있으면 반드시 생략하시오.
네가 만났던 그 소녀는 나의 형을 안다. (the girl, meet)
_________________________________ knows my
brother.
정답 The girl you met

---

**02.** 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오. 단, 생략 가능한
말이 있으면 반드시 생략하시오.
그 식탁 위에 있는 케이크는 맛이 있다. (the cake, the
table)
___________________________________ tastes
good.
정답 The cake on the table (The cake on the table)

---

**03.** 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오. 단, 생략 가능한
말이 있으면 반드시 생략하시오.
그가 들은 그 수업은 어려웠다. (take, class)
___________________ was difficult.
정답 The class he took

---

**04.** 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오. 단, 생략 가능한
말이 있으면 반드시 생략하시오.
Maria는 지붕이 초록색인 집에 산다. (the house, roof,
green)
Maria lives in
_____________________________________.
정답 the house whose roof is green.

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 문장을 완성하시오. 단, 생략 가능한
말이 있으면 반드시 생략하시오.
그는 내 생각을 좋아하는 유일한 사람이다. (only person,
idea)
He is ______________________________________.
정답 the only person that likes my idea.

---

**06.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계대명사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
The smartphone Allen bought doesn't work well.
[which]
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  doesn't
work well.
정답 The, smartphone, which, Allen, bought

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계대명사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
The man you met is my English teacher. [who]
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  is my
English teacher.
정답 The, man, who, you, met

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계대명사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
I can't find the book I borrowed from Tom. [which]
→ I can't find  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 from Tom.
정답 the, book, which, I, borrowed

---

**09.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계대명사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
Do you know that girl playing the piano? [who is]
→ Do you know  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 the piano?
정답 that, girl, who, is, playing

---

**10.** 다음 문장에서 생략된 관계대명사를 알맞은 위치에 넣어
문장을 완성하시오.
Here are a few novels written in Spanish. [which
were]
→ Here are  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 in Spanish.
정답 a, few, novels, which, were, written

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 131: 관계대명사의 생략 - 변형문제

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The girl who kicked a volleyball is my classmate.
Every dollar that you save today will help you in the future.
The boy who is running on the track is Tom.
This is the student who wrote this report.
> 정답: The boy who is running on the track is Tom., Every

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Tom is the most popular boy whom many students like.
We climbed the hill which is the tallest in the park.
Amy is a girl whose brother is my art teacher.
We will buy the same jacket that you bought yesterday.
> 정답: Tom is the most popular boy whom many students like., We will buy the same shoes that you bought yesterday.

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I cannot forget the story which contains a happy ending.
This is a movie which Amy likes to watch.
She wrote many poems which taught kids important values.
The boy whom I met yesterday is Tom.
> 정답: I cannot forget the story which contains a happy

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
The bike which is parked here is not mine.
I was happy to see the child who was playing with Mr. Lee.
I like the boy who is the fastest in my class.
Tom is the singer that I like best.
> 정답: I like the boy who is the fastest in my class.

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
Amy is wearing a bracelet _________ her mother gave her.
I didn't know the boy _________ she likes. that whose who which
> 정답: that

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 말을 고르시오.
He likes the girl ____________ standing by the door.
I have a friend ____________ interested in science. which is who is who are which are
> 정답: who is

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
(2개) The man you met at the store is my uncle.
This is the book I read yesterday.
The house is painted red was in this neighborhood.
Tom is the student has brown eyes.
> 정답: This is the book I read yesterday., The man you

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 문장을 고르시오.
(2개) Look at the children playing in the park.
The people whom break the law will be fined.
The shirt she is wearing is very colorful.
The gallery whose we visited last week closed now.
> 정답: The shirt she is wearing is very colorful., Look at the children singing on the stage.

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분을 생략할 수 있는 것을 모두 고른 것은? (a) The tablet that I bought doesn't charge. (b) Tom is my friend who lives upstairs. (c) This is the postcard which came from London. (d) Look at the girl who is reading a book. (a), (c) (a), (d) (a), (b) (c), (d)
> 정답: (a), (d)

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
Amy is a student that you can study with.
There was a new bridge which looked impressive.
The camera which I bought works well.
The girl who is standing there is Sarah.
> 정답: There was a new bridge which looked impressive.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
I saw the boy whose hair is curly at the bus stop.
I don't remember the number that you gave me.
Look at the white cat which is jumping on the sofa.
The woman who we saw is not a famous singer.
> 정답: I saw the boy whose hair is curly at the bus

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
The boy whom I met yesterday was Amy's brother.
Tom is the student that all teachers praise.
The students who study for the exam are very focused.
The birds which were sitting on the fence flew away.
> 정답: The students who study for the exam are very

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The café in which I met my friend is the Green Café.
Is this the old woman whose cat won the contest?
A man and his dog that were walking by were tired.
That is the boy who they are waiting for.
> 정답: That is the boy who they are waiting for.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 생략할 수 있는 것을 고르시오.
The cat which is sleeping on the bed looks tired.
This is the box in which I put my belongings.
Math is the subject which Tom likes most.
People who read regularly are well-informed.
> 정답: Math is the subject which Tom likes most.
